product_name: Vintage Green Ivy China Dinnerware Set (Service for ~8)
attributes: 1951 • Made in U.S.A. • Green Ivy Motif • Gold Trim • Coupe Shape
condition_notes: Large vintage green-ivy china set, ~40 pieces / service for about 8 with generous serving pieces: dinner plates, salad plates, coupe bowls & saucers, cups, creamer, gravy boat, covered sugar, covered casserole/serving dishes, a large vegetable bowl, and an oval platter. Cream/white coupe shape with green ivy leaves on tan vines and a gold/platinum rim. Backstamp: round 'Made in U.S.A.' crest, date code M-51 (1951). Condition: mostly clean; at least one serving piece (gravy/creamer) has a brown age-stain and light crazing — disclosed, see photos. Sold as a complete lot. LOCAL PICKUP ONLY — too heavy/fragile to ship economically.
